top_signals.title: SK Hynix Climbs 13% After Record $26.5 Billion US Offering
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc. delivered a 13% gain in its debut trading day on a US exchange, after breaking the record for the biggest first-time share sale by a foreign company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: These are America's 10 most expensive states for 2026, where inflation is punishing residents
top_signals.summary: These 10 U.S. states are the most expensive places to live in America in 2026, with inflation punishing residents to an extreme degree.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Over 70% of accommodations in Japan say they are understaffed amid tourism influx
top_signals.summary: Solving the issue is crucial to developing tourism sustainably as a strategic industry for Japan, the government said in a white paper released Friday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: MiCA licensing only the beginning as crypto custodians face scrutiny
top_signals.summary: A MiCA license allows crypto firms to operate in the EU, but the ESMA’s review will test whether custodians can meet the required security and resilience standards.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
